notes: Single source of truth for social share cards. Add one row per article. The build script scripts/build-og-cards.mjs reads this at build time and writes /public/og/og-{slug}.png. Reference by slug in PageHead: ogImage={slug}.

cards.pageTitle: Why Europe melts at 41°C when the Gulf works at 50°C | Bombay Breed
cards.description: An investor and policy brief on why European infrastructure and bodies are failing at temperatures the Gulf and South Asia absorb routinely. Climate Series, Article 01 of 05.
cards.title: Why Europe melts at 41°C when the Gulf works at 50°C.
